creator: rm@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 148468
py-libxml2 uses=python

It make py-libxml2 and py3-libxml2 fit better into ports python infrastructure and simplify maintainership efforts required. Build logs are there:

https://people.freebsd.org/~rm/py27-libxml2-2.9.2.log
https://people.freebsd.org/~rm/py34-libxml2-2.9.2.log
